description_long: This object is a retro-styled electronic device resembling an early television or monitor, featuring a large, rounded rectangular screen encased in a thick, beige bezel. The front panel displays a mesh-like speaker grille, two rotary dials, and a central button labeled 'Select', suggesting manual control for tuning or selection. The casing is primarily a combination of off-white and pastel green, with a sturdy, boxy base that likely houses internal electronics. The back is plain and solid, with no visible ports or ventilation, indicating a simplified or stylized design. The sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the object's robust and utilitarian construction. The brand name 'PatMatSONSC' is visible on the front, adding to its vintage character.
description: A vintage-style electronic device with a large rounded screen, beige bezel, and a pastel green base, featuring rotary dials and a mesh speaker grille on the front.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large screen, beige bezel, mesh speaker grille, rotary dials, and 'Select' button, with the brand name visible.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the depth of the screen housing and the boxy, pastel green base, with no visible controls.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, solid back with the rounded screen housing and pastel green base, lacking any ports or features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the depth and smoothness of the casing and base.
